# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User File Upload
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents
Version: 1.0
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class UserFileUpload {
    
    public function __construct() {
        add_action('init', array($this, 'init'));
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_scripts'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_upload_user_file', array($this, 'upload_file'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_upload_user_file', array($this, 'upload_file'));
    }
    
    public function init() {
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $user_files_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files';
        
        if (!file_exists($user_files_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_files_dir);
        }
    }
    
    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        wp_enqueue_script('jquery');
        wp_enqueue_script('user-file-upload', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'assets/js/upload.js', array('jquery'), '1.0', true);
        wp_localize_script('user-file-upload', 'ajax_object', array('ajax_url' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php')));
    }
    
    public function upload_file() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_die('Unauthorized');
        }
        
        if (!isset($_FILES['file'])) {
            wp_die('No file uploaded');
        }
        
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $user_files_dir = $upload_dir['basedir'] . '/user-files';
        
        $file = $_FILES['file'];
        $file_name = sanitize_file_name($file['name']);
        $file_tmp = $file['tmp_name'];
        $file_size = $file['size'];
        $file_type = $file['type'];
        
        $allowed_types = array(
            'image/jpeg',
            'image/jpg',
            'image/png',
            'image/gif',
            'application/pdf',
            'application/msword',
            'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'application/vnd.ms-excel',
            'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
            'text/plain'
        );
        
        if (!in_array($file_type, $allowed_types)) {
            wp_die('Invalid file type');
        }
        
        if ($file_size > 10485760) { // 10MB limit
            wp_die('File size exceeds limit');
        }
        
        $upload_file = $user_files_dir . '/' . $file_name;
        
        if (move_uploaded_file($file_tmp, $upload_file)) {
            $response = array(
                'success' => true,
                'message' => 'File uploaded successfully',
                'file_url' => $upload_dir['baseurl'] . '/user-files/' . $file_name
            );
            wp_send_json($response);
        } else {
            wp_die('Upload failed');
        }
    }
}

new UserFileUpload();
?>
